title: Operating Focus Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger operating focus foundations judgment so strategy work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Operating Focus Foundations is a leverage point inside strategy. It supports the broader goal of vision, positioning, competitive analysis, and strategic planning.
coreConcepts: Operating Focus Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good operating focus foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Operating Focus Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
